title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a deployment framework that streamlines GPU cloud deployment from IDEs using a single decorator. It enables hot reload for model swaps without container rebuilds and supports chaining multiple models. RunPod offers both pod-based and serverless deployment options with per-second H100 GPU pricing.
writeup: Audry Hsu presents Flash, a deployment framework that pushes GPU cloud workloads from an IDE using a single decorator. The framework adds hot reload for model swaps without container rebuilds and supports chaining multiple models. RunPod backs this with two deployment modes, pod-based and serverless, and per-second H100 GPU pricing. The takeaway: the workflow targets faster iteration and lower cost by removing rebuild steps and billing by the second.
